Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2D60 "SASCOMBATSIMULATOR-F000-2D60" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $f000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "SAS Combat Simulator.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Add an init routine at $F000 which copies 384 bytes to the end of colour memory ($DA80 - $DC00) so that the bottom part of the screen displays correctly. As the original game is frozen, the breakpoint to use for dumping is actually $2EA4.
